headline: Occidental Faces New Middle East Disruptions Testing Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Operational disruptions have hit Occidental Petroleum’s Shah gas field, linked to recent conflict in the Middle East. Crude loadings at Fujairah port are suspended, affecting Occidental Petroleum’s export and revenue channels. The disruptions introduce fresh operational risk for Occidental Petroleum, separate from day to day share price moves and analyst commentary. Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) now faces a direct hit to production and export activity from the Shah gas field and Fujairah...
